name: the-icarus-deception-how-high-will-you-fly
description: Seth Godin's manifesto on why the Icarus myth is wrong — don't fly too low. We are all artists now in the connection economy.
useCase: Learn why the Icarus myth is backwards, how to make art in any career, and why vulnerability is the price of creating.
knownRisks: Highly opinionated — Godin takes strong positions against traditional career advice
Not a step-by-step guide; more of a manifesto
